title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at TVS Supply Chain Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the TVS Supply Chain Solutions family as a Logistics Manager in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TVS Supply Chain Solutions:
TVS Supply Chain Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Supply Chain Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
